payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dining table/island with a light varnished wood live-edge rectangular tabletop and a dark brown paneled vertical base; a small potted plant sits on the surface and an electrical outlet is visible on the base side; smooth/varnished finish, chairs are partially visible at the left; appears close to the camera (approx. 1.2 m away).
